REQUEST_FAILED: The request could not be completed.
AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: This email is already in use.
AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password is incorrect.
AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute.
AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_UNAVAILABLE: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Please log in again.
AUTH_CSRF_INVALID: The security request is invalid. Please reload the page.
UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
